resources.string: Shows recently updated manga from your library
Your manga reader.\nChoose the app language.
How do you prefer to read manga?
Where should downloaded chapters be saved?
Jiyu is configured.\nYou can start reading.
Mobile data won\'t be used for chapter downloads
Source catalog, Custom CSS, Madara sources
Reading direction, Reading mode, Reader theme
Library backup, Settings backup, Mihon import
Reading goals, Community lists, Duplicate detector
Generic source for sites built on the Madara theme. Enter a name and site address - the app will try to parse standard Madara markup against it.
Only fill in if the default Madara selectors don\'t match this site (custom theme). Leave blank to use the defaults.
Edges turn pages, center toggles the controls
Two pages side by side in landscape (manga mode)
Pure black background between pages — saves battery on OLED screens
Automatically moves to the next chapter after the last page
Screen won\'t turn off while reading
Navigation skips chapters marked as read
Downloaded chapters get deleted after reading
Creates a .cbz file next to the image folder after downloading
Notify when the automatic chapter check finds updates
Notify when a chapter download finishes or fails
Sign in via MAL OAuth to sync tracking.
MAL Client ID: add it to local.properties as MAL_CLIENT_ID=xxx
Sign in to Kitsu to match manga.
Sign in to MangaUpdates to match manga.
Kitsu sign-in failed — check your email and password
Export saves all manga, chapters, progress, and categories to a JSON file.
Saves a backup to device storage daily (3 backups kept)
Pick a folder synced by Google Drive/Dropbox for cloud backup without any API setup.
Saves app settings (theme, tap zones, reader...) to JSON. Login tokens are not exported.
Import your library from Mihon or Tachiyomi. In Mihon: Settings → Backup → Create backup → JSON. Read chapters are preserved.
Please allow installs from Jiyu and try downloading again
Download started - check the notification bar
Preset Madara sources — add with one tap.
Tap + to add any Madara site.
Works with any site built on the WordPress Madara theme.
Leave blank to use the default Madara selector.
No items found - check the address or selectors
Each of the 9 screen zones can trigger a different action. Tap a zone to pick its action.
Pick an action for this screen area
CSS is injected into web source pages. Use it to hide ads or tweak the look.
Mark this and all older as read
You\'re not connected to the internet
Set MAL_CLIENT_ID in local.properties to enable search (myanimelist.net/apiconfig)
MAL_CLIENT_ID is not set. Register the app at myanimelist.net/apiconfig and add the CLIENT ID to local.properties.
Sign in to AniList in Account to link.
Sign in to Kitsu in Settings to link.
Sign in to MangaUpdates in Settings to link.
Names, techniques, and nicknames will always be translated this way, across every chapter.
Add a note for this manga…
No results. Enter a manga title.
Add your first manga and start reading
Mark the whole library as read?
All chapters of all %1$d manga in your library will be marked as read. This action can\'t be bulk-undone.
Try a different term or search by author / genre
Add manga from Browse, or change the filter
Names, techniques, and nicknames will always be translated the same way across every chapter.
No terms in the glossary yet.
Missing SUPABASE_URL in local.properties - translation has nowhere to call
You might already have this manga
\"%1$s\" has the same title as one already in your library from another source. Sources differ in translated chapter count and translation quality:
Enter a manga title and search\nall sources at once
Connect your AniList account and progress will update automatically as you read.
AniList Client ID is not set. Register the app at anilist.co/settings/developer (redirect URI: jiyu://anilist/callback) and add the Client ID to local.properties as ANILIST_CLIENT_ID=xxx
Upload your library and read chapters status to the cloud.
Reset email sent (if the account exists)
Deletes all downloaded chapters marked as read.
Downloaded chapters will show up here — read offline without a connection
All manga in your library have unique titles.
Chapters you read will show up here
No reading in the last 30 days
No updates\nAdd manga to your library
